title: Initialize Vinext app with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS in webapp/
description: npm create vinext@latest, App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind. Foundation for all other work.

title: Docker Compose: Neo4j 5 Community with Bolt+WS listeners
description: docker-compose.yml with Neo4j, WS listener on 7688, health check, volume for data persistence

title: Project structure: lib/neo4j, lib/graph, components, etl directories + .env.example
description: Create directory structure per TASKS.md, .env.example with NEO4J_URI/USER/PASSWORD

title: Neo4j schema initialization script with constraints and indexes
description: Cypher script: unique constraints on Politician.id, Legislation.expediente_id, LegislativeVote.acta_id; full-text indexes on name/title

title: Neo4j client wrapper: lib/neo4j/client.ts with typed query helpers
description: neo4j-driver-lite ESM, query() and queryGraph() methods, error handling, Workers-compatible

title: ESLint + Prettier configuration
description: Standard config for TypeScript React project

title: ETL types: Zod schemas for Como Voto legislators + votes JSON
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/types.ts with Zod schemas for legislators.json (compact), votaciones.json, and per-legislator detail. Also create transformer types for Neo4j node params.

title: ETL fetcher: download Como Voto JSON from GitHub
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/fetcher.ts — fetch legislators.json and votaciones.json from raw GitHub URLs. Validate with Zod schemas. Return typed data.

title: ETL transformer: map Como Voto to Neo4j params
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/transformer.ts — map legislators to Politician/Party/Province nodes, map votes to LegislativeVote nodes + CAST_VOTE relationships. Generate slugs, provenance fields.

title: ETL loader: batch MERGE into Neo4j
description: Create src/etl/como-voto/loader.ts — batch MERGE politicians, parties, provinces, votes, and relationships. Use parameterized Cypher, batched in chunks of 500.

title: ETL runner script: npm run etl:como-voto
description: Create scripts/etl-como-voto.ts CLI entry point. Orchestrate fetch → transform → load. Progress logging. Add npm script.

title: M2: Graph transform utilities — lib/graph/transform.ts to convert Neo4j records to {nodes, links} format
M2: Graph query service — lib/graph/queries.ts with Cypher queries for node neighborhood and search
M2: API route GET /api/graph/node/[id] — returns neighborhood {nodes, links} JSON
M2: API route GET /api/graph/search — search nodes by query string
Install react-force-graph-2d and create ForceGraph wrapper component
description: Client component wrapping react-force-graph-2d with node coloring by label, click handler for expand, zoom/pan. File: components/graph/ForceGraph.tsx

title: Create SearchBar component for graph explorer
description: Client component with debounced input calling /api/graph/search, displays results as node list. File: components/graph/SearchBar.tsx

title: Create NodeDetailPanel component
description: Sidebar panel showing selected node properties, labels, and relationships. File: components/graph/NodeDetailPanel.tsx

title: Create TypeFilter component for graph explorer
description: Toggle buttons to filter visible nodes by label (Politician, Party, Province, LegislativeVote). File: components/graph/TypeFilter.tsx

title: Create /explorar Graph Explorer page
description: Full page at app/explorar/page.tsx combining ForceGraph, SearchBar, TypeFilter, NodeDetailPanel. Server component shell with client island.

title: M4: Politician query functions — getPoliticianBySlug, getPoliticianVoteHistory, getAllPoliticianSlugs in lib/graph/queries.ts
M4: Politician profile page — SSR at /politico/[slug] with vote history, graph sub-view, Schema.org JSON-LD, OG tags
M5: Auth types + Neo4j adapter — DONE
Auth UI — sign-in page, sign-up page, user menu component
Install TipTap deps + investigation types and Zod schemas
description: npm install @tiptap/react @tiptap/starter-kit @tiptap/pm @tiptap/extension-link @tiptap/extension-image. Create lib/investigation/types.ts with Investigation interface, InvestigationStatus, create/update Zod schemas. Create barrel export.

title: Investigation Neo4j query functions
description: lib/investigation/queries.ts: createInvestigation, getInvestigationBySlug, updateInvestigation, deleteInvestigation, listPublishedInvestigations, getUserInvestigations, publishInvestigation (creates REFERENCES edges)

title: Investigation CRUD API routes
description: POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/investigations, GET /api/investigations (list), GET /api/investigations/[slug] (detail). Auth-protected write ops, public read for published.

title: TipTap editor component with toolbar
description: components/investigation/InvestigationEditor.tsx: TipTap editor with heading, bold, italic, link, image, lists, blockquote. Toolbar component. GraphNodeEmbed custom extension for embedding graph nodes inline.

title: Investigation create/edit pages
description: /investigacion/nueva and /investigacion/[slug]/editar — form with title, TipTap body, tags. Auth-protected. Save as draft or publish.

title: Investigation reading page
description: /investigacion/[slug] — SSR rendered investigation with TipTap HTML output, embedded graph nodes, author info, OG tags, Schema.org JSON-LD

title: Investigations index + my investigations
description: /investigaciones — published grid with tag filters. /mis-investigaciones — user's drafts + published.

title: Install satori + resvg-wasm and create OG image rendering utility
description: npm install satori @resvg/resvg-wasm, create lib/og/render.ts with renderOgImage() that takes JSX and returns PNG buffer

title: Politician OG image API route at /api/og/politician/[slug]
description: 1200x630 PNG with politician name, party, province, chamber, vote count. Dark theme matching site.

title: Investigation OG image API route at /api/og/investigation/[slug]
description: 1200x630 PNG with investigation title, author, summary, tags. Dark theme matching site.

title: Wire OG images into politician + investigation metadata
description: Update generateMetadata in both pages to include openGraph.images pointing to /api/og/ routes

title: PDF export for investigations
description: Add print-friendly CSS or client-side PDF generation for investigation reading pages

title: Rate limiting middleware for API routes
description: In-memory rate limiter: per-IP token bucket, apply to all /api routes, stricter limits on auth/mutation endpoints

title: Security response headers
description: Add CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy headers via middleware

title: Homepage upgrade with navigation
description: Replace stub homepage with proper landing: nav links to explorar/investigaciones/politicos, latest investigations carousel, platform description

title: Seed investigation content
description: Create 3-5 seed investigations with real Argentine political content for launch demo
